title: racosperma calcicola
intro: Racosperma calcicola, also known as the spinifex or spinifex grass, is a type of flowering plant native to Australia. It is a shrub-like plant with small, white flowers and has been traditionally used in medicine for its various properties. The medicinal properties of Racosperma calcicola include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of the plant include its ability to reduce fever, and it has been used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, to promote overall well-being.
